title: LITTLE BUD KIDS Spin-and-Read Phonics Toy, Rotating Wooden Reading Blocks with CVC Flashcards, A Montessori Reading Learning Resources Toy for 3-5 years old
features: LEARN TO READ: New readers will learn how to read and rhyme with our movable CVC word builder blocks & matching phonics flash cards. Letter combos in this set have been carefully chosen to maximize the # of common decodable CVC words for reception & EYFS. This set teaches the base standard of reading using 3-letter words. There are no sight words or words that don't follow the normal letter sounds; this encourages children as they are able to easily sound out any of the words our rods create.

TACTILE EYFS & YEAR 1 LEARNING MATERIAL: Rotating wooden letter blocks create 60+ 3-letter words. Each of the 5 wooden rods features one vowel and a set of consonants that rotate. Along with our animal alphabet letter sounds guide children will see how easy and quick it is to read with this fun spinning phonics toy.

DESIGNED FOR SELF-CORRECTION & EMPOWERMENT: 30 double-sided CVC flash cards with real-life images = a versatile Montessori reading material. Cards are designed for exploration & correction - one side has the picture, the other side includes the picture with the word. This design can be used for different stages of learning and allows kids to create the word on their own before checking its accuracy. Cards are color-coded by vowel as well and allow for fun games and letter pattern recognition.

A TRAVEL-FRIENDLY MONTESSORI TOY FOR TODDLERS & PHONICS WORKSHEET SET: This travel toy is designed for easy learning on-the-go and is a great kindergarten classroom must-have! Phonics flashcards are ring-bounded and a tote bag = easy clean-up. This set makes for a great gift for kids 3-6 years old. It even comes with phonics game ideas and a downloadable 25-page phonics worksheet set for more practice.

ECO-FRIENDLY, DURABLE, & SAFE: All our wood toys are 3rd-party certified non-toxic & kid-safe; this toy is made of solid beechwood, which is more durable than other cheaper woods. Our toys exceed all child safety regulations in the USA, UK, the EU, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, & Japan. Fully designed by a mom of young kids who deeply cares about ethics and safety.
description: Product Description LEARN HOW TO READ WITH OUR MONTESSORI PHONETIC READING BLOCKS & CVC FLASHCARD SET Is your 3-6 year old wanting to learn to read? Need learning resources or educational toys for teaching phonics and decoding simple words? Studies show that learning toys and phonics instruction greatly improves a child's foundation for word recognition , spelling, and reading comprehension. Our Spin-and-Read CVC word builder is a tactile Montessori material that introduces letter blending and rhyming while encouraging independent play and self-discovery. Each of the 5 wooden rods features one vowel and a set of consonants that rotate. Children create new words with this movable alphabet manipulative toy by turning the letter blocks. C-A-T becomes B-A-T then B-A-G. Our phonics toy creates 60+ toddler-friendly 3-letter words. **Note that some nonsense words are normal too, which is actually great for critical thinking!** Screen-free and portable, this phonics travel toy makes reading simple . This Christmas season, give your child the gift of reading! MONTESSORI TODDLER TOYS SHOULD BE FUN & EMPOWERING Plastic-Free & Durable Forget the plastic! Take care of the earth by choosing sustainably-harvested wooden toys that extend past the life of many plastic toys. We choose beech, a hardwood , over a cheaper soft wood such as pine, because of its extreme durability, knick-free quality, and beauty. While softwoods are cheaper, hardwood toys can be passed on for years. Our blocks are tested safe and non-toxic , and exceed all EU, UK, U.S., Canada, Japan, Australia/New Zealand Toy Safety regulations. Tests were conducted in 2020, 2021, & 2022 by TUV SUD, a German-based global regulatory compliance agency. Versatile, Multi-level, & Designed for Self-Guidance Real-life image CVC phonics flash cards for toddlers give a real understanding of the world. Boundable with a metal ring, double-sided, heavy-duty flashcards grow with your child's reading ability. One side features the word and picture, and is colour-coded by vowel; the other side features just the picture. Our learning toys are designed for self-correction, independent play, and endless game ideas. Traditional, Familiar Print Our rotating wooden blocks feature a plain, traditional print already familiar to your beginner reader. This is so he or she can confidently build upon existing knowledge. Our carefully selected letter combinations maximize the number of decodable words familiar to young children today, which creates a cycle of positive affirmation as they master word after word. Note that phonetic reading blocks will naturally create some nonsense words which is also great for reading practice! Travel-Friendly Educational Toy Enclosed in a giftable box, our blocks come with a travel tote bag & bounded cards, making this phonics game set your go-to travel game for the car, aeroplane, doctor's office, and restaurant . It's screen-free, multi-sensory, and versatile as it prompts children to have active and purposeful dialogue. All this makes for a great 3 year old and 4 year old gift for girls and boys! AN ALL-IN-ONE WOODEN TOY LEARNING RESOURCE Our manipulative movable alphabet blocks are the only all-in-one phonics game toy set on the market. We provide all you need for teaching reading to your toddler, early years, and Year 1 student - including alphabet letter sound guides, downloadable writing worksheets, and phonic activities for your 3, 4, 5, and 6-year-old. START YOUR CHILD’S READING JOURNEY WITH OUR MONTESSORI READING BLOCKS TODAY! COMES WITH DOWNLOADABLE CVC WORKSHEETS FOR ADDITIONAL PRACTICE! Our set comes with 25 pages of CVC worksheets, available as a download with your purchase! We believe that even ordinary families should have access to toys that are timeless, minimize our contribution to the landfill, and inspire creativity and growth. It is our mission to create and design toys that are packed with learning- and playing-potential and made out of natural materials as much as possible. All our toys are both kid- and parent-tested prior to production. We pride ourselves in bringing smiles not just for kids, but for the adults in their lives as well. We look forward to you joining us in our mission to transform the way we play and live.
